Package com.example._0zo.model

Class _0zoModel

java.lang.Object
com.example._0zo.model._0zoModel
public class _0zoModel extends Object
Model class for the Cincuentazo card game. Manages the deck logic, player hands, game board metrics, and structural game state conditions.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    _0zoModel()
    Initializes base collection structures for the game.

  • Constructor Details

    • _0zoModel

      public _0zoModel()
      Initializes base collection structures for the game.

  • Method Details

    • startGame

      public void startGame(int machines)
      Starts the global game state based on the selected amount of bots.
      Parameters:
      machines - Number of artificial players participating.

    • drawCard

      public String drawCard()
      Removes and returns the top card from the deck. Recycles table cards if empty.
      Returns:
      String representing the card code.

    • addCardToHumanHand

      public void addCardToHumanHand(String card)
      Appends a drawn card into the human's hand array.
      Parameters:
      card - Value of the card.

    • drawCardForMachine

      public void drawCardForMachine(int machineIndex)
      Appends a drawn card into a specific machine hand.
      Parameters:
      machineIndex - Target machine index.

    • getCardValue

      public int getCardValue(String card, int currentSum)
      Computes numeric values for cards according to the game metrics criteria.
      Parameters:
      card - Target card code.
      currentSum - Contextual reference of the table state.
      Returns:
      Integer modifier.

    • playHumanCard

      public void playHumanCard(int position, int aceValue) throws CardException
      Evaluates a card submission from the human hand.
      Parameters:
      position - Index position of the card within the user array.
      aceValue - Custom numeric override selected for the Ace card.
      Throws:
      CardException - If selection is invalid or the mathematical result exceeds 50.

    • playMachineCard

      public boolean playMachineCard(int machineIndex)
      Executes automated choices for artificial machine turns.
      Parameters:
      machineIndex - Index of the target machine bot.
      Returns:
      true if card placement was successful; false if player gets eliminated.

    • eliminateMachine

      public void eliminateMachine(int machineIndex)
      Shifts machine status to inactive and returns held items to the deck pool.
      Parameters:
      machineIndex - Target machine index.

    • eliminateHuman

      public void eliminateHuman()
      Shifts human status to inactive and flushes remaining hand contents.

    • humanCanPlay

      public boolean humanCanPlay()
      Verifies if the human hand contains at least one valid card permutation.
      Returns:
      true if a valid play exists; false otherwise.

    • getActivePlayers

      public int getActivePlayers()
      Counts dynamic state elements currently set as active.
      Returns:
      Number of active entities.

    • getWinnerName

      public String getWinnerName()
      Returns string representation metadata of the winner.
      Returns:
      Winner string descriptor.

    • getHumanHand

      public ArrayList<String> getHumanHand()

    • getTableCards

      public ArrayList<String> getTableCards()

    • getMachineHands

      public ArrayList<ArrayList<String>> getMachineHands()

    • getTableSum

      public int getTableSum()

    • getMachinePlayers

      public int getMachinePlayers()

    • isHumanAlive

      public boolean isHumanAlive()

    • getDeckSize

      public int getDeckSize()

    • isMachineAlive

      public boolean isMachineAlive(int machineIndex)
